linkedin.text:
Your delegates will forget the slide deck. They will not forget Barcelona.

The cities you choose for an incentive trip do something a bonus never will — they turn a reward into a memory people retell for years. Barcelona is built for exactly that: Gaudí skylines for rooftop receptions, Modernist palaces for gala dinners, beach clubs for the night that runs long.

At Uproduction we don't just book venues. We source the spaces, run the transfers, manage production end-to-end, and put a local team on the ground that knows every doorway in the city — so the experience feels effortless to everyone but us.

That's what "from business to pleasure" actually means: business objectives delivered through moments people genuinely love.

Planning Barcelona for 2026? Send us your headcount and we'll come back with a tailored venue shortlist within 48 hours.

#IncentiveTravel #CorporateEvents #MICE
linkedin.cta: DM us or book a call

facebook.text:

Rooftop receptions over Gaudí skylines, gala dinners in Modernist palaces, beach-club afterparties as the Mediterranean glows — and a local Uproduction team handling venues, transfers and production so you don't have to.

image_prompt: High aerial shot at sunset over Barcelona looking across the city toward the sea, the Sagrada Família spires catching warm light, dense terracotta rooftops and palm-lined avenues stretching to the Mediterranean, soft haze on the horizon, no people visible, sweeping cinematic scale. Photorealistic, 35mm film grain, no CGI, no text, no logos.
